title: When status change to something change another status in another board
excerpt:
Hi, 
I was wondering if this automation was possible or if there is a way to reach that: 
When status change to something change another status in another board 
thx for any help

posts.author: Azhyr (Benoit Provencal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I was wondering if this automation was possible or if there is a way to reach that:

When status change to something change another status in another board

thx for any help

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: You might connect the two status columns (so they have the same value, always) by mirroring.

posts.author: Azhyr (Benoit Provencal)
posts.cookedHtml: I need another status to change. Not the mirror column.

posts.author: JustAnotherPM (Stuart Hooker)
posts.cookedHtml: You can mirror the status column from the other board, and then trigger an update via an automation - https://community.monday.com/t/mirror-status-colums-triggering-events-in-mirrored-column/51550/8
